business_problem: Garuda Indonesia, Indonesia's national flag carrier connecting 64+ destinations worldwide, faced a historic aviation downturn during COVID-19 (IATA reported 65.9% drop in 2020 passenger demand) and needed to digitize—strengthening corporate website, mobile booking/ticketing, API management, back-office, and contactless services—while reducing operational cost.
solution_summary: Garuda Indonesia migrated its core airline operations from on-premises data centers to Alibaba Cloud infrastructure, reducing network latency by 20% and supporting seamless customer experience during the COVID-19 pandemic. The architecture ingests mission-critical data from corporate websites, mobile booking and ticketing applications, API management layers, and cargo systems through Database Transmission Service ensuring zero-downtime data synchronization. Server Load Balancers distribute traffic across redundant instances, while VPN Gateway maintains secure connectivity, enabling the airline to reduce IT costs while maintaining 24/7 service availability across booking, payment, and fulfillment workflows for global passengers.
business_outcome: Garuda Indonesia migrated 85+ VMs and 3 databases to Alibaba Cloud within 2 weeks with minimum business disruption while teams worked remotely, reduced network latency by nearly 20%, and shortened release/deployment cycles—directly supporting its IT-led cost-efficiency strategy.
metrics: 85+ VMs and 3 databases migrated in 2 weeks
architecture_clues: ACM for VM migration, DTS for database synchronization
SLBs and VPN for traffic distribution and secure connectivity
ViBiCloud Managed Services for ongoing operations
evidence_quotes: Through this cooperation, Garuda Indonesia managed to migrate over 85 VMs and 3 databases to Alibaba Cloud within 2 weeks with minimum business disruption.
With Alibaba Cloud, Garuda Indonesia managed to reduce network latency by almost 20%.

solution_components.name: Elastic Compute Service
solution_components.role: Virtualized infrastructure for airline website, ticketing, cargo management, and API services

solution_components.name: Alibaba Cloud Migration Service
solution_components.role: Managed service enabling synchronized migration of 85+ virtual machines with minimal business disruption

solution_components.name: Database Transmission Service
solution_components.role: Zero-downtime data synchronization for 3 production databases during cloud migration

solution_components.name: Server Load Balancer
solution_components.role: Traffic distribution across redundant application instances ensuring high availability

solution_components.name: VPN Gateway
solution_components.role: Secure encrypted connection tunnel between on-premises systems and cloud infrastructure during transition

solution_components.name: Tair
solution_components.role: High-performance cache for real-time booking and session state

data_flow: Passenger booking requests → website/mobile apps → load balancer → ECS backend → database layer → fulfillment
